mapper.sql: select setting_id, dept_id, spu_no, quanintiy, in_quanintiy, ready_quanintiy, specifications, setting_quanintiy, self_quanintiy, create_time, last_modify_time from store_sale_setting
mapper.insert:
insert into store_sale_setting
dept_id, spu_no, quanintiy, in_quanintiy, ready_quanintiy, specifications, setting_quanintiy, create_time, last_modify_time,
#{deptId}, #{spuNo}, #{quanintiy}, #{inQuanintiy}, #{readyQuanintiy}, #{specifications}, #{settingQuanintiy}, #{createTime}, #{lastModifyTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from store_sale_setting where setting_id in
#{settingId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT spu_no FROM store_goods_quotation t1, store_goods_quotation_goods t2 WHERE t1.quotation_id = t2.quotation_id AND dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.status != '0' AND t2.status = '1'
